home.heroDesc: The all-in-one marketplace connecting filmmakers with locations, equipment, talent, and crew. Book with confidence — every listing is verified.

locations.title: Filming Locations
locations.desc: Discover unique venues — studios, rooftops, villas, deserts — verified by our team.

equipment.title: Equipment Rental
equipment.desc: Professional cameras, lighting, grip, and sound gear from trusted companies.

models.title: Models & Casting
models.desc: Browse talent by look, experience, and availability for your next shoot.

crew.title: Crew Hire
crew.desc: Find DPs, ACs, photographers, and specialists — filter by role and availability.

01.title: Browse & Filter
01.desc: Search locations, equipment, talent, or crew with powerful filters.

02.title: Check Availability
02.desc: View real-time calendars and select your preferred dates and times.

03.title: Book & Pay
03.desc: Secure your booking with transparent pricing and commission-based fees.

04.title: Shoot & Review
04.desc: Complete your production and leave reviews for the community.

verified.title: Verified Listings
verified.desc: Every location is reviewed by our admin team before going live.

realtime.title: Real-Time Availability
realtime.desc: Live calendars so you never double-book.

protection.title: Equipment Protection
protection.desc: Photo evidence policy protects both parties.

home.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of production professionals already using PreProduction to streamline their projects.

locations.desc: Discover verified filming locations for your next production.
locations.empty: No locations found. Be the first to add one!

equipment.desc: Professional gear from verified equipment companies.

crew.desc: Hire experienced DPs, ACs, photographers, and specialists.

models.desc: Find the perfect talent for your production.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your PreProduction account
login.verifyDesc: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Join PreProduction and start booking
signup.checkEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click the link in the email to activate your account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noListings: You haven't added any listings yet.
dashboard.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Still filming the last scene…

chat.title: PreProduction Assistant
chat.subtitle: Typically replies instantly
chat.greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to PreProduction. How can I help you today?
chat.greetingUser: Hi {{name}}! 👋 How can I help you today?
chat.fallback: I'm not sure about that. Try asking about bookings, listings, pricing, or how to sign up. You can also reach us at support@preproduction.com or in phone number : 07********.

footer.tagline: The marketplace for production professionals. Find locations, equipment, talent, and crew.
